tagline: Building the Future of Intelligent Vision
key_platform_features: Works on existing IP/RTSP cameras — no hardware replacement
On-premise edge AI — no video leaves the network
Audit-grade event logs with timestamped clips

solutions.name: Person Analytics
solutions.tagline: Understand how people move and behave
solutions.description: Turn everyday video into operational and security intelligence by understanding how people move, gather, and behave across your facilities.
capabilities: Crowd Count & Estimation — real-time density detection
Face Recognition — identity verification against watchlists
No Face Mask Detection — compliance monitoring
Searchable Person Attributes — forensic search by appearance

solutions.name: Security & Threat Detection
solutions.tagline: Proactive threat detection before incidents occur
solutions.description: Proactively surface dangerous behavior and emergencies the moment they unfold — keeping people and assets protected around the clock.
capabilities: Fight, Assault & Violence — aggressive movement detection
Riots & Stone Pelting — crowd convergence alerts
Person Collapse Detection — medical emergency detection
Person Waving for Help — distress signal recognition
Lone Woman Detection — vulnerable situation monitoring
Woman Surrounded by Men — group dynamics detection

solutions.name: Vehicle & Traffic Intelligence
solutions.tagline: Smart traffic enforcement and parking management
solutions.description: Turn road and parking cameras into an intelligent enforcement and mobility platform for smarter traffic management and parking operations.

solutions.name: Retail & Customer Analytics
solutions.tagline: Convert in-store video into measurable insight
solutions.description: Convert in-store video into measurable insight on customer behavior, advertising engagement, and inventory performance to drive retail growth.

solutions.name: Object & Environment Monitoring
solutions.tagline: Watch for hazards, objects, and disruptions 24/7
solutions.description: Continuously watch the physical environment for objects, hazards, and disruptions that put people and operations at risk — with real-time alerts.
capabilities: PPE Detection — hard hat, vest, gloves
